title: Assertion fault when window functions are used.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, num REAL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, num) VALUES ('test1', 1.5), ('test2', NULL), ('test3', 3.0);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT id AS c FROM test_table) AS subquery) AS outerquery WHERE c IN (SELECT row_number() OVER() FROM (SELECT 0) AS dummy);
key_bug_features: Assertion fault with row_number() in window functions
